title: Revert 23w46a
description: Revert the changes made to the crafter and copper bulb in 23w46a
body:
# Revert 23w46a

In the snapshot 23w46a, the useful one-tick delay of the copper bulb was removed.
Additionally, the crafter got a limit of only being able to craft one item every four ticks.

This mod reverts these changes.

## Why is this a bad change?

The one-tick delay is very useful in redstone contraptions.
For a more in-depth exploration of the impact of these changes, check out this awesome video by [Purplers](https://www.youtube.com/@Purplers): 
<iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/lDzFYlLHBz4" title="Mojang Is About To RUIN Copper Bulbs (And Crafters)" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
